i18n.Landing.FinalCta.body: Sign in and get a professional document in minutes.
i18n.Landing.FinalCta.title: Ready to generate your first book?
i18n.Landing.Hero.subtitle: Upload documents, notes or links and let the AI turn them into books, manuals and summaries ready to export.
i18n.Landing.Hero.title:
Turn your material
into a professional book
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.export.body: Review and edit chapters, then export to PDF, DOCX, EPUB or Markdown. Ready to share, print or publish.
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.export.title: Export anywhere
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.goal.body: Book, summary, study notes, training course, technical manual or research report. You pick the goal, the AI adapts tone and structure.
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.goal.title: Choose what to generate
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.upload.body: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, images, URLs or plain text notes. Drop everything in one place: the AI reads and understands your sources.
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.upload.title: Upload your material
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.write.body: It analyzes documents, extracts key concepts, organizes chapters and generates content. You watch the progress in real time.
i18n.Landing.HowItWorks.write.title: The AI structures and writes

i18n.Library.title: Sources
i18n.Models.book.about: A book is a complete, self-contained publication, organized in chapters, that develops a topic from start to finish.
i18n.Models.book.desc: A complete book organized in chapters.
i18n.Models.book.h1: Preface, table of contents and chapters
i18n.Models.book.name: Book
i18n.Models.course.about: A course is a complete learning path, structured in modules and lessons with exercises and quizzes.
i18n.Models.course.name: Course
i18n.Models.custom.about: A custom project lets you freely define structure, length and options, part by part.
i18n.Models.custom.desc: Build a tailored project controlling every part.
i18n.Models.custom.name: Custom
i18n.Models.manual.about: A manual is a step-by-step operational explanation for using, installing or maintaining a product or procedure.
i18n.Models.manual.name: Manual
i18n.Models.presentation.about: A presentation is content ready for slides, with titles, key points and speaker notes.
i18n.Models.presentation.desc: Content ready for slides and decks.
i18n.Models.presentation.name: Presentation
i18n.Models.report.about: A report is a structured document that gathers analysis, data, findings and recommendations in a clear, professional way.
i18n.Models.report.desc: Professional analysis of data and documents.
i18n.Models.report.name: Report
i18n.Models.study_guide.about: A study guide is material organized to learn and review quickly, with outlines, examples and quizzes.
i18n.Models.study_guide.name: Study guide
i18n.Models.summary.about: A summary is a short, easy-to-review version that captures the essentials of the material without extensive development.
i18n.Models.summary.name: Summary
i18n.Models.thesis.about: A thesis is a structured academic document that reports research in a rigorous, verifiable way.
i18n.Models.thesis.name: Thesis & Research

i18n.Wizard.KindDesc.book: Create a structured book organized in chapters.
i18n.Wizard.KindDesc.custom: Free configuration to fit your needs.
i18n.Wizard.KindDesc.research_report: Write academic reports and detailed research.
i18n.Wizard.KindDesc.study_guide: Create study guides and educational material.
i18n.Wizard.KindDesc.training_course: Build complete courses and learning material.
i18n.Wizard.Mode.academic.desc: Rigorous, citation-rich output for scholarly work.
i18n.Wizard.Mode.academic.label: Academic
i18n.Wizard.Mode.balanced.desc: A good balance between speed and quality.
i18n.Wizard.Mode.balanced.label: Balanced
i18n.Wizard.Mode.business.desc: Concise, action-oriented tone for business docs.
i18n.Wizard.Mode.business.label: Business
i18n.Wizard.Mode.deep_research.desc: Deeper analysis across sources for thorough results.

i18n.Wizard.Mode.educational.desc: Clear, didactic style for learning material.
i18n.Wizard.Mode.educational.label: Educational

i18n.Wizard.Mode.technical.label: Technical
